esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Top query stats from pg_stat_statements; total_exec_time is delta per scrape
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time IS NOT NULL AND attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time > 0
// Threshold: total exec time > 10 seconds in window (delta); tune for scrape interval
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time > 10000
| KEEP service.instance.id, attributes.db.namespace, attributes.db.query.text, attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time, attributes.postgresql.calls
| SORT attributes.postgresql.total_exec_time DESC
| LIMIT 20
